verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He walked where I walk, He stood where I stand, He felt what I feel, He understands. He knows my frailty, Shared my humanity, Tempted in every way Yet without sin.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God with us, so close to us, God with us, Emmanuel! God with us, so close to us, God with us, Emmanuel! Emmanuel!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One of a hated race, Stung by the prejudice, Suffered injustice, Yet He forgives. Wept for a wasted year, Paid all my wickedness, He died in my place That I might live.
